entries.content:
## Standup — 2026-03-15

### Progress

- Project formally kicked off: **AI Agent App Starter Kit** is now active
- CSS theming system and shared atoms is **in review** — foundational design tokens and component atoms are ready for feedback
- Tool definitions, registry, and adapters extraction is **in progress** — core building block for M6 (Tools Package)
- Project board is populated with full feature backlog across all 4 epics: Foundation, Server + Claude Agent SDK, App + State + Chat UI, and Advanced Features


### Next Steps

- Merge CSS theming system once review is complete
- Continue and complete **Extract tool definitions, registry, and adapters** (M6)
- Begin picking up backlog items under **[Epic] Foundation — Extract + Scaffold**
- Formally activate **M6: Tools Package — Define Once, Deploy Everywhere** as the current milestone
- Assign owners to high-priority backlog features to unblock parallel workstreams


### Blockers

- No hard blockers at this time
- No milestone is currently active — M6 should be formally started to give the team a clear target
- No standup or retro history yet; establishing cadence is a priority
entries.author: pm

entries.content:
## Status Update — 2026-03-15

**Health:** on-track


## 🚀 Project Kickoff — AI Agent App Starter Kit

The **AI Agent App Starter Kit** has officially kicked off! The goal is to deliver a fully scaffoldable monorepo starter (`npx create-protolab my-app --kit ai-agent-app`) with streaming chat, tool invocations, HITL confirmation, extended reasoning, slash commands, multi-provider model support, and agent roles — all powered by the Claude Agent SDK and Vite + React 19.

### Current State
- **CSS theming system & shared atoms** is in review — foundational UI layer nearly ready
- **Tool definitions, registry, and adapters** extraction is actively in progress (M6 foundation)
- Full feature backlog is loaded across 4 epics and 5 milestones (M6–M10)
- First standup completed; Monday 9am cadence established

### Immediate Priorities
- Complete the CSS theming review and merge
- Activate **M6: Tools Package — Define Once, Deploy Everywhere** as the working milestone
- Begin picking up Foundation epic backlog items to unblock parallel workstreams

### Risks
- Large backlog with no assigned owners yet — parallel workstream coordination needed soon
- M6 milestone not yet formally activated; team needs a clear target to rally around

No hard blockers. Momentum is building. 🟢
entries.author: pm
